evals.prompt: GitHub start. Add a Build and Price button that lets dealers create a quote from the current configuration. Parent feature is #2481.
evals.expected_output: Prompts only for missing/ambiguous information if needed, creates a GitHub User Story issue linked to parent #2481, adds it to IJACK Roadmap with defaults, creates a local branch named like ####-add-build-and-price-quote-button, and checks it out without pushing.

evals.prompt: start github issue for fixing the admin login redirect after session timeout.
evals.expected_output: Because no parent is provided, searches open Feature issues with label:"📍 Feature" -status:Done, asks the user to choose a parent or confirm none, then creates the GitHub User Story issue, adds it to IJACK Roadmap with defaults, creates a four-digit issue-number-prefixed branch from the generated title, and checks it out without pushing.

evals.prompt: github start: users need to be able to export the quote preview as a PDF, parent https://github.com/ijack-technologies/ijack/issues/3102
evals.expected_output: Extracts parent issue 3102 from the URL, creates a user story for PDF export, links it as a sub-issue, adds project fields, creates and checks out the matching four-digit issue branch.
